title: plumeria rubra f. tricolor
intro: Plumeria rubra f. tricolor, also known as the Red Frangipani, is a variety of the Plumeria rubra plant that has distinctive three-colored flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. These properties have been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. The flowers and leaves of the plant can be used to make herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are believed to have a calming and soothing effect on the mind and body.
